# DEEP-61 240 route smoke sample (jpcite v0.3.4, 2026-05-07).
# 1 row 1 path; comments allowed. All paths are GET-able anonymous-tier
# read endpoints — none mutate state. Mirrors docs/openapi/v1.json
# enumeration as of Wave 23 (194 routes) extended to 240 by query-string
# permutation and per-prefecture path samples.
